meaning: vt.使着迷,使神魂颠倒vi.入迷,极度迷人的
examples: Angels fascinate, as Christmas-card-makers rediscover every year.
The private lives of movie stars never fail to fascinate.
These renegades, cerebral experiments fascinate many of his peers.
Verhoeven is going through the Fascinate UI icon by icon pointing out every difference he can.
It continues to fascinate as an entertainment vehicle and as a brand for many reasons.
